allow: Bash(curl -s -i -X POST https://mcp.figma.com/mcp -H 'Authorization: Bearer __TRACKED_VAR__' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0"}}}')

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-1\\.5 rounded-\\[8px\\] text-\\[14px\\] font-medium tracking-\\[-0\\.35px\\] whitespace-nowrap cursor-default"\\n\(\\s*\)style=\\{\\{ backgroundColor: res\\.bg, color: res\\.text \\}\\}/className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-1.5 rounded-[8px] border text-[14px] font-medium tracking-[-0.35px] whitespace-nowrap cursor-default"\\n${1}style={{ backgroundColor: res.bg, color: res.text, borderColor: res.border }}/' src/components/common/LogTableConsent.tsx)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-1\\.5 rounded-\\[8px\\] text-\\[14px\\] font-medium tracking-\\[-0\\.35px\\] whitespace-nowrap"\\n\(\\s*\)style=\\{\\{ backgroundColor: res\\.bg, color: res\\.text \\}\\}/className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-1.5 rounded-[8px] border text-[14px] font-medium tracking-[-0.35px] whitespace-nowrap"\\n${1}style={{ backgroundColor: res.bg, color: res.text, borderColor: res.border }}/' src/components/common/LogTableConsent.tsx)

Bash(perl -0pi -e "s/import \\{ SearchBlueIcon, RefreshIcon, FilterModuleIcon, FilterResultIcon \\} from '\\@\\/components\\/ui\\/icons';/import { SearchBlueIcon, RefreshIcon, FilterModuleIcon, FilterResultIcon, TestModuleIcon } from '\\@\\/components\\/ui\\/icons';/" src/pages/LogDetailPage.tsx src/pages/LogDetailConsentPage.tsx)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's|<ModuleIcon type=\\{mod\\.iconType\\} color=\\{mod\\.color\\} />|<ModuleTypeIcon module={row.module} size={22} />|g' src/components/common/LogTable.tsx src/components/common/LogTableConsent.tsx)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's|function ModuleIcon\\\(\\{ type, color \\}: \\{ type: string; color: string \\}\\\) \\{.*?\\n\\}\\n||s' src/components/common/LogTable.tsx src/components/common/LogTableConsent.tsx)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/import \\{ FaceIdIcon, PlamIcon, ModuleTypeIcon \\} from/import { FaceIdIcon, PlamIcon, ModuleTypeIcon, AuthMethodBadge } from/' src/components/common/LogTable.tsx src/components/common/LogTableConsent.tsx)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's|\\s*\\{isPalm \\? : \\}\\s*\\s*\\{isPalm \\? t\\\(.auth_type\\.palm_short.\\\) : t\\\(.auth_type\\.face_short.\\\)\\}\\s*\\s*||s' src/components/common/LogTable.tsx)
